title: analytics_schema_coarse
description: Population-level analytics signals (no medication class). Ta-2 side-effect presence, Ta-3 adherence friction, risk stratification.

side_effect_present.description: Ta-2: binary adverse-event / side-effect signal at population granularity.

adherence_friction_present.description: Ta-3: adherence barrier or friction signal (missed dose, side-effect barrier).

risk_band.description: Population risk stratification band derived from event risk_level.
